id: secret-delete

  children={"Delete an application secret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/secrets/{secret-name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete an application secret. Requires administrator level privileges to the app.
